transformation_metadata.trigger_description: Ambient Psycho Power surge in Bison's lair — Chun Li absorbs the energy through fighting-stance willpower. No physical artifact, no machinery, no serum.

cast.name: Chun Li
cast.wardrobe: Baseline (tiers 2-5): canonical SF2 cobalt-blue silk qipao with gold trim, gold-trimmed lapel, side slits, white thigh-high boots/stockings, brown spiked leather gauntlets on both wrists, white leather sash belt, twin buns secured with red silk ribbons. Tier 6: qipao tearing apart in burst of Psycho Power, new peak outfit materializing. Tiers 7: new peak-form outfit — form-fitting cobalt-blue and gold bodysuit, high leg cuts revealing developed thighs, sleek metallic gauntlets, white sash detail, twin buns + red ribbons intact. L33 coverage held — bust, groin, glutes fully covered at all tiers.
cast.ip_note: Street Fighter II (Capcom) — canonical SF2 design. Fan-production / non-commercial creative exercise.

locations.description: Bison's villain chamber: dark stone-block walls, glowing purple-violet Psycho Power energy ambient in the air, scattered Shadaloo machinery silhouettes in deep background, low-angle dramatic crimson + violet rim lighting, polished obsidian floor reflecting the energy, oppressive cathedral-scale chamber proportions. Volumetric purple-violet glow, ray-traced subsurface scattering, physically-based materials.

panels.action: Chun Li strides into Bison's villain chamber, defiant fighting stance, hands raised in classic guard. Ambient purple-violet Psycho Power energy fills the air around her, swirling like volumetric smoke. Wide low-angle hero shot establishing the cathedral-scale chamber.
panels.hair_state: twin buns secured with red silk ribbons, classic SF2 ox-horns silhouette
panels.costume_state: Tier 2 baseline. Canonical SF2 cobalt-blue silk qipao with gold trim, side slits, white thigh-highs, brown spiked leather gauntlets on both wrists, white sash. Pristine.
panels.psycho_power_state: Ambient purple-violet glow filling the chamber. No traceries on her skin yet. Eyes normal brown.
panels.expression: Defiant, alert, brow set, eyes scanning. Strikingly beautiful — vogue-cover glamour Asian features, defined cheekbones, flawless skin.
captions: I can feel his Psycho Power... everywhere.
panels.notes: SPLASH 1/3. Establishes the chamber + Chun Li's entrance. Wide low-angle hero shot — drama-first. Beauty anchor active. L23 verbal anchor: dark stone walls, purple Psycho Power, Shadaloo machinery silhouettes, crimson + violet rim lighting, polished obsidian floor.

panels.action: Medium three-quarter view of Chun Li, fighting stance lowered slightly, head turned as she scans the chamber. Purple Psycho Power tendrils beginning to drift toward her body, attracted to her ki.
panels.hair_state: twin buns secured with red silk ribbons, classic SF2 ox-horns silhouette
panels.costume_state: Tier 2 baseline qipao, intact. Same as p01-01.
panels.psycho_power_state: Tendrils of purple Psycho Power energy reaching toward her like fingers. Not yet contacting her body.
panels.expression: Curiosity deepening, alert, beautiful — defined cheekbones, slightly parted lips.
panels.notes: Tier 2 baseline still. Camera variety: medium three-quarter eye-level. Beauty anchor active. L22: hair state named.

panels.action: Extreme close-up of Chun Li's face. Her brown eyes widen as the first wave of Psycho Power surges into her body — a subtle purple shimmer crosses her irises. Lips parted in shock-becoming-awe.
panels.hair_state: twin buns secured with red silk ribbons, classic SF2 ox-horns silhouette, framing her face
panels.costume_state: Tier 3 — neckline of the qipao visible at the bottom of frame, fabric tight across the upper chest.
panels.psycho_power_state: Purple shimmer entering her irises. First contact. Faint purple traceries beginning on her temples.
panels.expression: Eyes wide with dawning awe, mouth parted, beautiful Chun Li face anchored — flawless skin, glamour lighting, vogue-cover glamour.
panels.notes: Tier 3 first growth beat. ECU-face for the awe-onset moment. Beauty + L17 canonical anchor critical here. L22 hair state. L24: no earrings, no modern jewelry (ears in frame).

panels.action: Three-quarter full-body of Chun Li. Qipao fabric visibly strains across her bust and biceps — first small tears at sleeve caps and side seams. Bust noticeably fuller, arms developed. She looks down at her own hands, flexing.
panels.hair_state: twin buns secured with red silk ribbons, classic SF2 ox-horns silhouette
panels.costume_state: Tier 4 — seam strain at deltoids and bust line. First small tears at non-coverage seams (sleeve cap, side hem under arm). Coverage 100% preserved per L33.
panels.psycho_power_state: Purple traceries on her forearms and visible upper-arm skin. Faint aura building around her form. Eyes still mostly brown with subtle purple flecks.
panels.expression: Wonder, focused, slight smile of realization, beautiful — defined cheekbones, glamour lighting.

dialogue.text: Yes... I can feel it growing.

captions: Bison thought he could control this. He was wrong.
panels.notes: Tier 4 — visible bust + muscle growth. Three-quarter full-body, slight low-angle. L33 coverage preserved. Chest oversize compensation per memory: prompt for LARGER than tier-4 figure shows. L24: brown spiked gauntlets canonical on wrists.

panels.action: Extreme close-up of her torso/chest at tier 5. Qipao fabric tearing along the side seam mid-rip, developed lats and obliques visible through tears, bust significantly enlarged straining the fabric. Purple Psycho Power glow on her skin. Side-lit dramatic profile.
panels.hair_state: twin buns + red ribbons (head partially in frame at top — buns silhouette visible)
panels.costume_state: Tier 5 — fabric pulled taut, multiple tears at non-coverage seams. Sleeves split at the cap. Side seams beginning to give mid-rip. Coverage 100% preserved per L33 — bust covered, groin out of frame.
panels.psycho_power_state: Purple traceries clearly visible across her skin, glowing. Aura more pronounced.
panels.expression: Not in primary frame (region ECU), but visible profile chin/jaw line — beautiful, jaw set, empowered.
captions: The fabric can't contain me anymore.
panels.notes: Tier 5 — body-region ECU showing tear in progress. SFX baked in-image per L19 (allow_baked_lettering=true). L25 body-region reveal stickiness applies. Chest oversize compensation.

panels.action: MCU body — the qipao tears apart in a burst of Psycho Power energy, fragments dissolving into purple light. The new peak-form bodysuit (cobalt blue with gold trim) materializes around her body mid-frame. Both states visible — partial qipao remains dissolving into purple light, new outfit partially solidified. Tier 6 muscle + bust mass visible.
panels.hair_state: twin buns secured with red silk ribbons, intact through the burst, classic SF2 silhouette
panels.costume_state: TIER 6 MATERIALIZATION BEAT. Original qipao fragments dissolving into purple-violet Psycho Power energy. New peak-form bodysuit — cobalt blue + gold, high leg cuts, sleek metallic gauntlets reforming on wrists — materializing solid where the old outfit dissolves. Coverage held throughout the transition per L33.
panels.psycho_power_state: PEAK BURST — volumetric purple-violet energy surrounding her body, traceries on all visible skin, eyes glowing intense purple. Aura at maximum visual intensity for this beat.
panels.expression: Triumphant, lips parted in a victorious shout, beautiful — vogue-cover glamour even at peak energy intensity.

dialogue.text: A new form... for a new power!

sfx.source: Psycho Power burst transforming the costume

panels.notes: TIER 6 PIVOT BEAT — costume transformation. Tier-6 reinforcement ref auto-attaches (L29). New outfit design must be locked at ref-gathering stage via a costume turnaround. SFX baked per L19. Camera mcu three-quarter, slight low-angle. Chest oversize critical here — tier 6 should read AS tier 7 in raw output.

panels.action: FULL-PAGE SPLASH. Chun Li in her new peak-form outfit — fully materialized — striking a hero stance mid-chamber. One hand at hip, one extended in beckoning fighting guard. Psycho Power swirling around her as a tamed purple aura. Tier 7 peak muscle + bust mass. Cathedral chamber framing her dramatically.
panels.hair_state: twin buns secured with red silk ribbons, classic SF2 ox-horns silhouette
panels.costume_state: TIER 7 — new peak-form outfit fully solid: cobalt-blue and gold form-fitting bodysuit, high leg cuts revealing developed thighs, sleek metallic gauntlets, gold accents, white sash detail. L33 coverage — bust, groin, glutes fully covered. The new outfit signature of her transformed form.
panels.psycho_power_state: Tamed purple aura — visible but controlled. She COMMANDS it now. Eyes still subtly glowing purple but back to readable Chun Li expression.
panels.expression: Triumphant smirk, confident, dominant, beautiful — vogue-cover glamour Asian beauty, glamour lighting on the face, defined cheekbones.

dialogue.text: Bison... you've made me STRONGER than you could have imagined.

panels.notes: SPLASH 2/3 — first full-body reveal of tier-7 Chun Li in new outfit. Tier-7 reinforcement ref auto-attaches (L30). Beauty anchor critical. Camera variety: full-body three-quarter low-angle hero shot.

panels.action: Extreme close-up of beautiful tier-7 Chun Li's face. Glowing subtle purple in her eyes from the tamed Psycho Power. A smirk of triumph. Twin buns + red ribbons frame her face. Glamour lighting.
panels.hair_state: twin buns secured with red silk ribbons, classic SF2 ox-horns silhouette, framing her face
panels.costume_state: Tier 7 new outfit — visible at the bottom of frame (collar / shoulder of the bodysuit).
panels.psycho_power_state: Subtle purple glow in her irises, controlled. Faint aura at the edges of frame.
panels.expression: Triumphant smirk, dominant, commanding, strikingly beautiful — vogue-cover glamour, defined cheekbones, flawless skin, glamour lighting.
captions: I tamed the power that broke armies. Bison's reign is over.
panels.notes: Tier 7 face-anchor beat. Beauty maximum here. L17 canonical Chun Li face. L22 hair. L24: no earrings, no modern jewelry. ECU-face for the dominance beat.

panels.action: Tier-7 Chun Li walking toward the chamber exit at the right side of frame, profile view, peak form rendered. Psycho Power swirling behind her in trails, the chamber receding. Her stride confident and purposeful.
panels.hair_state: twin buns secured with red silk ribbons, classic SF2 ox-horns silhouette
panels.costume_state: Tier 7 new peak-form outfit, profile view — bodysuit form-fitting against her developed musculature, high leg cuts visible from the side. L33 coverage held.
panels.psycho_power_state: Aura behind her, trailing like a comet tail. She is moving with intent.
panels.expression: Side profile — set jaw, eyes forward, confident. Beautiful side profile, defined cheekbones.
captions: The Lightning Kick will be the LAST thing he sees.
panels.notes: Tier 7 — full-body profile walking pose. Camera variety: profile angle (only profile in the sequence). L23 environment anchor if env ref dropped: Shadaloo chamber receding, polished obsidian floor, purple energy ambient.

panels.action: FINAL FULL-PAGE SPLASH. Chun Li in classic fighting stance — signature Chun Li hero pose, body coiled with potential energy, fists raised. Low-angle dramatic hero shot. Psycho Power tamed as a faint purple aura around her form. She looks forward, past camera, toward Bison's direction.
panels.hair_state: twin buns secured with red silk ribbons, classic SF2 ox-horns silhouette
panels.costume_state: Tier 7 new peak-form outfit, full body shown — signature SF2-color palette (cobalt blue + gold), sleek metallic gauntlets, white sash, high leg cuts. L33 coverage held.
panels.psycho_power_state: Faint controlled purple aura. She owns it now.
panels.expression: Determined, focused, beautiful — defined cheekbones, eyes locked forward, signature Chun Li hero presence.

dialogue.text: Spinning Bird Kick is just the warm-up now.

panels.notes: SPLASH 3/3 — final hero splash. Tier-7 reinforcement ref attached. Camera variety: full-body low-angle hero shot (similar to p07 but more battle-ready stance). Beauty maximum. The 'For my father' caption ties Chun Li's canonical motivation (her father killed by Bison) to the empowerment beat.

camera_variety_check.check_result: PASS — 8 distance + 6 angle categories, 3 ECU panels, 4 splash/wide panels, max 2 same-combo (full-body × low-angle: p07 + p10, but p07 has hero-stance modifier and p10 has slight-three-quarter, so distinct in practice).

lettering_directive: All speech bubbles (white ellipse with tail), captions (yellow rounded-rectangle internal-thought boxes), and SFX baked into the panel image at generation time per L19. Page-composer applies layout but does NOT re-letter — text is already in the panel.
